DecisionLayerSet.description: Decision-layered market context. This is the canonical observed-facts container.

macro_context.description: Higher timeframe context: month, week, day.
macro_context.title: Macro Context

DecisionLayerSet.title: DecisionLayerSet

InstrumentRef.description: Stable instrument metadata for replay and backtests.
InstrumentRef.title: InstrumentRef

ObservedContextWindow.description: Observed facts for one timeframe within one decision layer.

bars_considered.description: Number of bars used by the producer.
bars_considered.title: Bars Considered

latest_range.description: Latest observed range for the timeframe.

swing_points.description: Observed swing sequence available to downstream recognizers.
swing_points.title: Swing Points

liquidity_levels.description: Observed liquidity references relevant to the timeframe.
liquidity_levels.title: Liquidity Levels

orderflow_signals.description: Observed order-flow events captured for the timeframe.
orderflow_signals.title: Orderflow Signals

value_area.description: Observed value area snapshot when available.

session_stats.description: Observed session aggregate statistics when available.

raw_features.description: Additional raw facts for future backward-compatible extensions.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

ObservedContextWindow.title: ObservedContextWindow

ObservedCrossSessionSequence.description: Observed sequence that links process data across multiple sessions.

last_observed_at.description: Most recent time the sequence was updated.
last_observed_at.title: Last Observed At

session_sequence.description: Sessions already involved in the sequence.
session_sequence.title: Session Sequence

price_zone_low.description: Observed lower boundary of the active price zone.
price_zone_low.title: Price Zone Low

price_zone_high.description: Observed upper boundary of the active price zone.
price_zone_high.title: Price Zone High

start_price.description: Observed price when the sequence started.
start_price.title: Start Price

latest_price.description: Most recent observed price for the sequence.
latest_price.title: Latest Price

linked_episode_ids.description: Liquidity episode identifiers attached to the sequence.
linked_episode_ids.title: Linked Episode Ids

linked_drive_ids.description: Initiative-drive identifiers attached to the sequence.
linked_drive_ids.title: Linked Drive Ids

linked_exertion_zone_ids.description: Exertion-zone identifiers attached to the sequence.
linked_exertion_zone_ids.title: Linked Exertion Zone Ids

linked_event_ids.description: Observed event identifiers attached to the sequence.
linked_event_ids.title: Linked Event Ids

raw_features.description: Additional measured sequence features for replay and scoring.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

ObservedCrossSessionSequence.title: ObservedCrossSessionSequence

ObservedEventMarker.description: Producer-side marker used to attach notable events to a snapshot.

details.description: Additional raw event facts emitted by the producer.
details.title: Details

ObservedEventMarker.title: ObservedEventMarker

ObservedExertionZone.description: Historically important price zone created by prior large executed volume and exertion.

source_drive_id.description: Initiative-drive identifier that established the zone.
source_drive_id.title: Source Drive Id

side.description: Side that originally pushed from the zone.

price_low.description: Lower bound of the exertion zone.
price_low.title: Price Low

price_high.description: Upper bound of the exertion zone.
price_high.title: Price High

established_at.description: When the zone first became important.
established_at.title: Established At

last_interacted_at.description: Most recent revisit or interaction time.
last_interacted_at.title: Last Interacted At

establishing_volume.description: Observed total traded volume that established the zone.
establishing_volume.title: Establishing Volume

establishing_delta.description: Observed net delta while the zone was being established.
establishing_delta.title: Establishing Delta

establishing_trade_count.description: Observed trade count during the establishing burst.
establishing_trade_count.title: Establishing Trade Count

peak_price_level_volume.description: Largest observed price-level executed volume inside the zone when available.
peak_price_level_volume.title: Peak Price Level Volume

revisit_count.description: How many times price revisited the zone after establishment.
revisit_count.title: Revisit Count

successful_reengagement_count.description: Observed revisits where the original side responded again from the zone.
successful_reengagement_count.title: Successful Reengagement Count

failed_reengagement_count.description: Observed revisits where the original side failed to defend or re-fire from the zone.
failed_reengagement_count.title: Failed Reengagement Count

last_revisit_delta.description: Observed delta during the most recent revisit window.
last_revisit_delta.title: Last Revisit Delta

last_revisit_volume.description: Observed traded volume during the most recent revisit window.
last_revisit_volume.title: Last Revisit Volume

last_revisit_trade_count.description: Observed trade count during the most recent revisit window.
last_revisit_trade_count.title: Last Revisit Trade Count

last_defended_reaction_ticks.description: Reaction achieved after the latest successful defense, in ticks.
last_defended_reaction_ticks.title: Last Defended Reaction Ticks

last_failed_break_ticks.description: Distance price moved through the zone after the latest failure, in ticks.
last_failed_break_ticks.title: Last Failed Break Ticks

post_failure_delta.description: Observed delta after the latest failure window, useful for stop-driven follow-through.
post_failure_delta.title: Post Failure Delta

post_failure_move_ticks.description: Follow-through distance after the latest failure, in ticks.
post_failure_move_ticks.title: Post Failure Move Ticks

raw_features.description: Additional measured zone features for replay and context-building.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

ObservedExertionZone.title: ObservedExertionZone

ObservedGapReference.description: Observed session gap and its interaction history.

session_code.description: Session where the gap reference is anchored.

opened_at.description: Timestamp when the gap became active.
opened_at.title: Opened At

direction.description: Whether the session opened above or below the prior reference.

prior_reference_price.description: Reference price from the prior auction, usually prior session close or value edge.
prior_reference_price.title: Prior Reference Price

current_open_price.description: Observed open price that created the gap reference.
current_open_price.title: Current Open Price

gap_size_ticks.description: Observed gap size expressed in ticks.
gap_size_ticks.title: Gap Size Ticks

first_touch_at.description: First time price traded back into the gap, if it has happened.
first_touch_at.title: First Touch At

max_fill_ticks.description: Deepest observed penetration into the gap, in ticks.
max_fill_ticks.title: Max Fill Ticks

fill_ratio.description: Observed fraction of the gap that has been repaired so far.
fill_ratio.title: Fill Ratio

fill_attempt_count.description: How many observed attempts have interacted with the gap.
fill_attempt_count.title: Fill Attempt Count

accepted_inside_gap.description: Whether price has shown acceptance inside the gap area.
accepted_inside_gap.title: Accepted Inside Gap

rejected_from_gap.description: Whether price has rejected after entering or touching the gap area.
rejected_from_gap.title: Rejected From Gap

fully_filled_at.description: Timestamp when the gap was fully filled, if completed.
fully_filled_at.title: Fully Filled At

raw_features.description: Additional observed facts such as distance-to-fill or value relationship.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

ObservedGapReference.title: ObservedGapReference

ObservedInitiativeDrive.description: Measured aggressive-order push that moved price away from a zone.

side.description: Aggressive side that initiated the push.

price_low.description: Lower bound of the drive origin or drive path.
price_low.title: Price Low

price_high.description: Upper bound of the drive origin or drive path.
price_high.title: Price High

aggressive_volume.description: Observed aggressive traded volume attributed to the drive.
aggressive_volume.title: Aggressive Volume

net_delta.description: Observed net delta during the drive window.
net_delta.title: Net Delta

trade_count.description: Observed number of trades inside the drive window.
trade_count.title: Trade Count

consumed_price_levels.description: How many price levels were consumed or lifted during the drive.
consumed_price_levels.title: Consumed Price Levels

price_travel_ticks.description: Observed travel distance achieved by the drive, in ticks.
price_travel_ticks.title: Price Travel Ticks

max_counter_move_ticks.description: Largest counter move observed while the drive was active, in ticks.
max_counter_move_ticks.title: Max Counter Move Ticks

continuation_seconds.description: How long price continued in the drive direction after the initial push.
continuation_seconds.title: Continuation Seconds

raw_features.description: Additional measured drive features for replay and later modeling.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

ObservedInitiativeDrive.title: ObservedInitiativeDrive

ObservedLiquidityEpisode.description: Measured price-band interaction episode, still kept as observed facts.

side.description: Dominant side associated with the episode.

price_low.description: Lower bound of the defended or contested zone.
price_low.title: Price Low

price_high.description: Upper bound of the defended or contested zone.
price_high.title: Price High

executed_volume_against.description: Observed executed volume hitting the zone from the opposite side.
executed_volume_against.title: Executed Volume Against

replenishment_count.description: Observed number of replenishment events near the zone.
replenishment_count.title: Replenishment Count

buyers_hitting_same_level_count.description: Observed count of aggressive buyers repeatedly hitting the same defended price or zone.
buyers_hitting_same_level_count.title: Buyers Hitting Same Level Count

sellers_hitting_same_level_count.description: Observed count of aggressive sellers repeatedly hitting the same defended price or zone.
sellers_hitting_same_level_count.title: Sellers Hitting Same Level Count

pull_count.description: Observed number of liquidity pull events near the zone.
pull_count.title: Pull Count

price_rejection_ticks.description: Observed rejection distance after interaction, in ticks.
price_rejection_ticks.title: Price Rejection Ticks

ObservedLiquidityEpisode.title: ObservedLiquidityEpisode

ObservedLiquidityLevel.description: A price level derived by the producer and stored as an observed fact.

first_seen_at.description: When this level first entered the current dataset.
first_seen_at.title: First Seen At

swept.description: Whether price traded through the level.
swept.title: Swept

ObservedLiquidityLevel.title: ObservedLiquidityLevel

ObservedManipulationLeg.description: Observed forcing leg used later for range, trap, or extension analysis.

side.description: Directional side of the forcing leg.

displacement_ticks.description: Observed size of the manipulation leg, in ticks.
displacement_ticks.title: Displacement Ticks

linked_zone_id.description: Related exertion zone or key zone when the leg originates from one.
linked_zone_id.title: Linked Zone Id

primary_objective_ticks.description: First observed objective for the leg, in ticks.
primary_objective_ticks.title: Primary Objective Ticks

secondary_objective_ticks.description: Second observed objective for the leg, in ticks.
secondary_objective_ticks.title: Secondary Objective Ticks

primary_objective_reached.description: Whether the first objective was reached.
primary_objective_reached.title: Primary Objective Reached

secondary_objective_reached.description: Whether the second objective was reached.
secondary_objective_reached.title: Secondary Objective Reached

raw_features.description: Additional facts about trap context, displacement, or distribution after the leg.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

ObservedManipulationLeg.title: ObservedManipulationLeg

ObservedMeasuredMove.description: Measured price expansion expressed as a multiple of a reference leg or range.

measured_subject_id.description: Observed subject that is being measured.
measured_subject_id.title: Measured Subject Id

side.description: Directional side of the measured move.

anchor_price.description: Price where the measured expansion began.
anchor_price.title: Anchor Price

latest_price.description: Latest price reached by the measured move.
latest_price.title: Latest Price

achieved_distance_ticks.description: Observed travel distance achieved by the measured move, in ticks.
achieved_distance_ticks.title: Achieved Distance Ticks

reference_kind.description: Reference family used to normalize the measured move.

reference_id.description: Optional identifier for the reference leg, gap, or range.
reference_id.title: Reference Id

reference_distance_ticks.description: Observed size of the reference unit, in ticks.
reference_distance_ticks.title: Reference Distance Ticks

achieved_multiple.description: Achieved distance expressed as a multiple of the reference unit.
achieved_multiple.title: Achieved Multiple

body_confirmed_threshold_multiple.description: Highest threshold multiple confirmed by body close, if tracked.
body_confirmed_threshold_multiple.title: Body Confirmed Threshold Multiple

next_target_multiple.description: Next target multiple activated by the current measurement ladder.
next_target_multiple.title: Next Target Multiple

invalidated.description: Whether the measured move has been invalidated by later structure.
invalidated.title: Invalidated

raw_features.description: Additional measured facts about thresholds, bodies, or pauses inside the leg.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

ObservedMeasuredMove.title: ObservedMeasuredMove

ObservedOrderFlowSignal.description: Execution-level order-flow signal captured from footprint or DOM.

price.description: Associated price if the signal is price-specific.
price.title: Price

magnitude.description: Normalized producer-side magnitude for filtering or sorting.
magnitude.title: Magnitude

notes.description: Short producer-side annotations explaining the signal.
notes.title: Notes

ObservedOrderFlowSignal.title: ObservedOrderFlowSignal

ObservedPostHarvestResponse.description: Observed response after a liquidity objective has already been harvested.

harvest_subject_id.description: Observed subject that completed the harvest.
harvest_subject_id.title: Harvest Subject Id

harvest_subject_kind.description: Observed subject kind that completed the harvest.
harvest_subject_kind.title: Harvest Subject Kind

harvest_completed_at.description: Timestamp when the harvest was considered complete.
harvest_completed_at.title: Harvest Completed At

harvest_side.description: Directional side of the completed harvest move.

harvested_price_low.description: Lower boundary of the harvested price zone.
harvested_price_low.title: Harvested Price Low

harvested_price_high.description: Upper boundary of the harvested price zone.
harvested_price_high.title: Harvested Price High

completion_ratio.description: Observed completion ratio for the targeted liquidity pocket.
completion_ratio.title: Completion Ratio

continuation_ticks_after_completion.description: Additional same-side travel after completion, in ticks.
continuation_ticks_after_completion.title: Continuation Ticks After Completion

consolidation_range_ticks.description: Observed consolidation width after completion, in ticks.
consolidation_range_ticks.title: Consolidation Range Ticks

pullback_ticks.description: Largest pullback observed after completion, in ticks.
pullback_ticks.title: Pullback Ticks

reversal_ticks.description: Largest opposite-direction reversal observed after completion, in ticks.
reversal_ticks.title: Reversal Ticks

seconds_to_first_pullback.description: Seconds between completion and the first pullback.
seconds_to_first_pullback.title: Seconds To First Pullback

seconds_to_reversal.description: Seconds between completion and the strongest reversal print.
seconds_to_reversal.title: Seconds To Reversal

reached_next_opposing_liquidity.description: Whether price reached the next opposing liquidity pocket after completion.
reached_next_opposing_liquidity.title: Reached Next Opposing Liquidity

next_opposing_liquidity_price.description: Observed price of the next opposing liquidity pocket when reached.
next_opposing_liquidity_price.title: Next Opposing Liquidity Price

post_harvest_delta.description: Net delta observed after completion inside the response window.
post_harvest_delta.title: Post Harvest Delta

raw_features.description: Additional measured facts such as drift speed, counter-drive quality, or reversion targets.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

ObservedPostHarvestResponse.title: ObservedPostHarvestResponse

ObservedProcessContext.description: Optional process-aware context spanning seconds to cross-session sequences.

session_windows.description: Observed session windows for longer-horizon context.
session_windows.title: Session Windows

initiative_drives.description: Measured aggressive-order drives and their execution quality.
initiative_drives.title: Initiative Drives

measured_moves.description: Measured distance ladders expressed as multiples of a leg, range, or gap span.
measured_moves.title: Measured Moves

manipulation_legs.description: Observed forcing legs used for trap, extension, or distribution context.
manipulation_legs.title: Manipulation Legs

gap_references.description: Observed session gaps plus their fill and acceptance history.
gap_references.title: Gap References

post_harvest_responses.description: Observed reactions after a liquidity objective has already been harvested.
post_harvest_responses.title: Post Harvest Responses

exertion_zones.description: Historically important drive-origin zones and revisit evidence.
exertion_zones.title: Exertion Zones

cross_session_sequences.description: Observed sequences connecting episodes across sessions.
cross_session_sequences.title: Cross Session Sequences

ObservedProcessContext.title: ObservedProcessContext

ObservedSecondFeature.description: One-second microstructure aggregate for heatmap and path reconstruction.

latest_range.description: Observed price path within the second.

volume.description: Observed traded volume in the second.
volume.title: Volume

best_bid.description: Best bid observed near the end of the second.
best_bid.title: Best Bid

best_ask.description: Best ask observed near the end of the second.
best_ask.title: Best Ask

max_bid_depth.description: Maximum observed bid depth inside the second.
max_bid_depth.title: Max Bid Depth

max_ask_depth.description: Maximum observed ask depth inside the second.
max_ask_depth.title: Max Ask Depth

depth_imbalance.description: Normalized depth imbalance for the second.
depth_imbalance.title: Depth Imbalance

raw_features.description: Additional measured microstructure features for replay.
raw_features.title: Raw Features

ObservedSecondFeature.title: ObservedSecondFeature

ObservedSessionStats.description: Observed session metrics from ATAS or a local adapter.
ObservedSessionStats.title: ObservedSessionStats

ObservedSessionWindow.description: Observed session-level process context for cross-session analysis.

value_area.description: Observed session value area when available.

ObservedSessionWindow.title: ObservedSessionWindow

ObservedSwingPoint.description: A price swing directly measured from bars or swing logic on the producer side.

kind.description: Whether the swing is a high or a low.

formed_at.description: Timestamp when the swing became valid.
formed_at.title: Formed At

leg_index.description: Zero-based position in the local swing sequence.
leg_index.title: Leg Index

tags.description: Observed producer-side labels, not analyst interpretation.
tags.title: Tags

ObservedSwingPoint.title: ObservedSwingPoint

SourceRef.description: Producer metadata for tracing and support.

chart_instance_id.description: Chart or indicator-instance identifier used to separate multiple live ATAS charts.
chart_instance_id.title: Chart Instance Id

SourceRef.title: SourceRef

description: Top-level payload emitted on critical event triggers.

event_type.description: Primary event type for the snapshot.

trigger_event.description: Observed event that triggered the snapshot.

decision_layers.description: Decision-layered observed facts at trigger time.

process_context.description: Optional process-aware context from seconds to cross-session sequences.

title: EventSnapshotPayload
